# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Set up build environment
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y build-essential
      
      - name: Build application
        run: |
          mkdir -p build
          mkdir -p dist
          echo "Building application..."
          # Add your build commands here
          # Example: make build
          # Example: npm run build
          # Example: go build -o dist/app
      
      - name: Compile binaries
        run: |
          echo "Compiling binaries..."
          # Add your compilation commands here
          # Example for multiple platforms:
          # GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/app-linux-amd64
          # GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/app-windows-amd64.exe
          # GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/app-darwin-amd64
      
      - name: Prepare configuration files
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/config
          cp -r config/* dist/config/ || echo "No config directory found"
          # Copy specific configuration files
          # cp application.yml dist/config/
          # cp database.yml dist/config/
      
      - name: Prepare deployment scripts
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/scripts
          cp -r scripts/* dist/scripts/ || echo "No scripts directory found"
          chmod +x dist/scripts/*.sh || echo "No shell scripts found"
          # cp deploy.sh dist/scripts/
          # cp install.sh dist/scripts/
      
      - name: Create version file
        run: |
          echo "BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC')" > dist/VERSION.txt
          echo "COMMIT_SHA=${{ github.sha }}" >> dist/VERSION.txt
          echo "BRANCH=${{ github.ref_name }}" >> dist/VERSION.txt
          echo "BUILD_NUMBER=${{ github.run_number }}" >> dist/VERSION.txt
      
      - name: Upload compiled binaries
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: binaries-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: |
            dist/*.exe
            dist/app*
            !dist/config
            !dist/scripts
          retention-days: 30
      
      - name: Upload configuration files
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: config-files-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: dist/config/
          retention-days: 30
      
      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: dist/scripts/
          retention-days: 30
      
      - name: Upload complete build package
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: complete-build-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: |
            dist/
            dist/VERSION.txt
          retention-days: 30
      
      - name: Generate artifact summary
        run: |
          echo "## Build Artifacts Generated" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### Build Information" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Build Number:** ${{ github.run_number }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Commit SHA:** ${{ github.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Branch:** ${{ github.ref_name }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Build Date:** $(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC')" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### Available Artifacts" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- binaries-${{ github.run_number }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- config-files-${{ github.run_number }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- deployment-scripts-${{ github.run_number }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- complete-build-${{ github.run_number }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### Artifact Contents" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "\`\`\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          find dist -type f >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "\`\`\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
